title: Dark Crimson Isle for Hypixel Skyblock
description: Hi, I present to you my ideal texture pack so you don't hurt your eyes when you're on Crimson Isles on the Hypixel Skyblock server !
body:
# **🪨 Dark Crimson Isle – Minecraft 1.21.10**

I present to you my ideal texture pack so you don't hurt your eyes when you're on Crimson Isles on the Hypixel Skyblock server or nether vanilla !

Feel free to give me feedback so I can improve it.

## **Features:**
Darker and smoother netherack and the other blocks that make up the Nether texture

Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21!

Lightweight and easy to install

## Installation 
Place the ZIP file in your resourcepacks folder and enable it in the Resource Packs menu.
##
